title: FeeCalculationModalityTypeValues
description: Describes how the fee is calculated

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Amount
x-enumeration-literals.description: A set fee regardless of transaction size or volume (e.g. $10 flat fee).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage-Based
x-enumeration-literals.description: A % of the transaction amount (e.g. 1.5% of transfer amount).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered/Slab-Based
x-enumeration-literals.description: Different rates depending on value ranges (e.g. 1% up to $1,000, then 0.5%).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Capped Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description: Fee is calculated normally but cannot exceed a max amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Minimum Fee
x-enumeration-literals.description: A lower limit is enforced (e.g. at least $1 even if % is small).
